briefs.title: BC Gaming Control Act Takes Effect April 2026 — Security Guards at Casinos and Horse Racing Venues Affected
briefs.summary: Starting April 13, 2026, BC's new Gaming Control Act replaces older gaming rules. Security guards working at provincial casinos or horse racing facilities must now be registered or licensed under the new Act to legally wear body armour or work without a separate security services licence.
briefs.action_required: Confirm all security guards at your gaming or horse racing site are registered under the new Gaming Control Act by April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Control Act takes effect — new registration rules for gaming security guards
